text:
Tom Cruise is a household name of the Hollywood industry, and his movies are some of the most-watched of all times, be it the franchises like Top Gun or Mission Impossible. Moreover, he never ceases to amaze his fans with some of his amazing stunts and heroics, including the insane one at the Paris Olympics 2024. But, how much did he actually get paid for performing it?
